title: EDN53 CANCELLED General Information for Cultivators, Producers and Packagers of Cannabis Products - Canada.ca
content:
## EDN53 CANCELLED General Information for Cultivators, Producers and Packagers of Cannabis Products

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-03-19. For updated information on the application and administration of the excise duty framework for cannabis products, refer to:
- Memorandum EDM6-1, General information on the possession, sale, and distribution of cannabis products and the cannabis stamping regime
- Memorandum EDM6-2, Obtaining and renewing a cannabis licence
- Memorandum EDM6-3, Imposition and payment of duty on cannabis products

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
